brief: Implement approved plan for Pi workflow/runtime/agent harness improvements in phases. Start with phase 1-2 foundations: runtime event/receipt contracts, storage diagnostics, canonical receipts.jsonl, v1 compatibility diagnostics, and shared mutation boundary. Preserve centralized `pi workflow`; no top-level `pi harness` or `pi state`. Run targeted tests and npm run check.
objective: Complete all approved goals with verification

goals.title: Implement approved plan for Pi workflow/runtime/agent harness improvements in...
goals.objective: Implement approved plan for Pi workflow/runtime/agent harness improvements in phases. Start with phase 1-2 foundations: runtime event/receipt contracts, storage diagnostics, canonical receipts.jsonl, v1 compatibility diagnostics, and shared mutation boundary. Preserve centralized `pi workflow`; no top-level `pi harness` or `pi state`. Run targeted tests and npm run check.
goals.evidence: Implemented initial approved phase foundations: added runtime event/receipt contracts in harness-control-plane/types.ts, canonical receipts/events JSONL helpers and diagnostics in storage.ts, shared mutateRuntimeSession boundary in mutation.ts, and routed `pi workflow start` through the boundary so start emits event+receipt+state projection. Updated workflow tests to cover centralized workflow state and start receipt. Verified targeted workflows test and npm run check.
